finding_results.notes: Replaced euphemistic narration-about-swearing with direct in-scene speech tied to the immediate stressor (burned garlic, tape failure, shift-route panic).
Added explicit consequence for the theft on-page: Ravi names the breach, imposes a new disclosure rule with an enforcement condition, and the chapter ends on that changed trust state.

summary: High-priority structural/craft defects were resolved with minimal collateral churn: pressure beats now use concrete spoken irritation, and the watch theft now generates an explicit relational consequence before chapter close.
